; J9729A Configuration Editor; Created on release #WC.16.11.0005
; Ver #0a:f8.04.52.5a.f3.ff.37.2f.ef:d3

hostname "sw-edge-01"
module 1 type J9729A
snmp-server community "public" Operator

vlan 1
   name "DEFAULT_VLAN"
   no untagged 1-24
   untagged 25-26,A1
   no ip address
   exit
vlan 10
   name "USERS"
   untagged 1-24
   tagged 25-26
   ip address 192.168.10.1/24
   exit
vlan 20
   name "GUESTS"
   untagged 25-26
   ip address 192.168.20.1 255.255.255.0
   exit

interface 1
   name "Desk phone 1"
   enable
   exit
interface 25
   name "Uplink trunk"
   enable
   exit
interface A1
   name "Router uplink"
   routing
   ip address 10.0.0.2/30
   enable
   exit

ip default-gateway 10.0.0.1
ip route 192.168.99.0/24 10.0.0.254
